title: stachys alopecuros subsp. godronii
intro: Stachys alopecuros subsp. godronii, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wood Betony include relief from headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Wood Betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in folk medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being.
